  1. at.jku.se.iot

  1. Beschreibung
  2. Methodenübersicht

    1. connect()
    2. disconnect()

Schnittstelle IoTProtocol

Alle bekannten Implementierungsklassen:
MockProtocolAdapter, MqttProtocolAdapter
public interface IoTProtocol
Abstraction for IoT communication protocols (MQTT, CoAP, Zigbee, etc.). Implementations bridge the SmartHome system to physical hardware.

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifikator und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    void
    connect()
    Opens the connection to the underlying hardware or broker.
    void
    disconnect()
    Closes the connection and releases any associated resources.
    String
    getProtocolName()
    Returns a short identifier of the protocol implementation (e.g., "MOCK", "MQTT").
    boolean
    isConnected()
    Indicates whether the protocol adapter currently has an open connection.
    void
    sendCommand(DeviceCommand command)
    Sends a command to the target hardware.
    void
    subscribe(String topic, Consumer<DeviceEvent> listener)
    Subscribes to events published on the given topic.
    void
    unsubscribe(String topic)
    Removes a previous subscription.

  • Methodendetails

    • connect

      void connect() throws IoTException
      Opens the connection to the underlying hardware or broker.
      Löst aus:
      IoTException - if the connection cannot be established

    • disconnect

      void disconnect()
      Closes the connection and releases any associated resources.

    • isConnected

      boolean isConnected()
      Indicates whether the protocol adapter currently has an open connection.
      Gibt zurück:
      true when connected, false otherwise

    • sendCommand

      void sendCommand(DeviceCommand command) throws IoTException
      Sends a command to the target hardware.
      Parameter:
      command - the command to dispatch
      Löst aus:
      IoTException - if the command cannot be delivered

    • subscribe

      void subscribe(String topic, Consumer<DeviceEvent> listener) throws IoTException
      Subscribes to events published on the given topic.
      Parameter:
      topic - the topic to subscribe to
      listener - callback invoked for each received event
      Löst aus:
      IoTException - if the subscription cannot be registered

    • unsubscribe

      void unsubscribe(String topic) throws IoTException
      Removes a previous subscription.
      Parameter:
      topic - the topic to unsubscribe from
      Löst aus:
      IoTException - if unsubscription fails

    • getProtocolName

      String getProtocolName()
      Returns a short identifier of the protocol implementation (e.g., "MOCK", "MQTT").
      Gibt zurück:
      the protocol name
